briefdescription.para: Builds a dictionary for the given type name.

detaileddescription.para: Builds a dictionary for a specific data type.

briefdescription.para: Registers an include path with the interpreter.
Builds a PCM file for the given type.

detaileddescription.para: Builds a Precompiled Module (PCM) file for a specific module.
Initiates the build of all dictionaries and PCM files.

briefdescription.para: Counts occurrences of a substring in a string.

detaileddescription.para: Counts occurrences of a substring within a string.

briefdescription.para: Implementation of the bsc_t class and related utilities.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains methods for type translation, buffer management, and dictionary building.
